x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: ITOM Visibility/Health entitlement gates Now Assist ITOM AI features. Without the correct SKU, ITOM Now Assist capabilities will not activate.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Contact your ServiceNow account team to confirm ITOM Visibility or ITOM Health SKU entitlement. Without the correct SKU, ITOM Now Assist capabilities will not activate regardless of plugin installation or data quality.
